title: omnichannel.message.received v1
description: Emitted when an inbound message arrives on any channel. Raw message content is NOT included (GDPR). Source: alebrije-mod-omnichannel.

sender_type.description: AQ-112: identity class of the party that sent this inbound message. Resolved from the conversation's sender_type column in the WhatsApp-origin producer (alebrije-mod-omnichannel). Inherited from envelope.v1; surfaced here because this is the primary AQ-112 producer event. Nullable + optional for backward compatibility.

branch_id.description: AQ-112: originating branch for the message, mapped from the conversation's context_id (alebrije-mod-omnichannel). Inherited from envelope.v1; surfaced here for consumer documentation. Distinct from the envelope-level context_id (routing context). Nullable + optional for backward compatibility.

text_preview.description: First 200 chars of text content for routing rules only — no full content.

media_url_hash.description: SHA-256 of media URL for dedup — never the raw URL (may contain tokens).
